item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 11,492 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes S grip Lapel choke defence Cross collar grip break to takedown Grip break on upper back Collar grip break downward Closed guard figure 8 Leg drag Closed guard standing up Double ankle grab pass Double under Toreando Two grip choke on turtle Crusifix Buggy choke Close guard overhook st...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Figure-four grip North south Kimura Estima lock Canto choke Gogoplata Rubber guard Double leg .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes README index Formatting Guard retention drills Side shimmy practice Neck related Seatbelt grip Rekkamies Gable grip Thumb and cuff grip .

item.title: Sit up guard
item.description: General Not really a guard in the strictest sense, but rather a Shin to shin -like position where you are sitting close to opponents leg and have a good control over it with arm and leg.

item.title: De La Riva and Reverse De La Riva
Ankle pick
item.description: General Great setup for standing where you literally pick up the opponents ankle to look for variety of different takedowns Setup Forward arc Get a Thumb and cuff grip on the opponents Sleeve on the same side.

item.title: Headquarters
item.description: Description A strange sitting position on opponents waist that prevents them effectively from moving their waist or legs.

item.title: Arm crossing
item.description: General Remain aware that you should only cross your own arms if you have a good reason for it.

item.title: Berimbolo
item.description: General Berimbolo is essentially an attack system to take the back.
